module.name: progress
module.description: Visually displays a percentage as a progress bar.
module.aiSpec:
A horizontal PROGRESS BAR for a single percentage — completion, a score, capacity or KPI attainment. This module takes NO body; all input comes from params. Show one bar per metric; for several metrics, stack multiple progress directives. Do NOT use this for a multi-category breakdown (use a bar chart) — it is a single 0-100 meter. Parameters: `percent` (number 0-100, default 50) — the fill amount. `label` (text, default "") — name of what is measured, shown on the left. `color` (color, default accent) — fill and percent-text color. `track` (color, default #eee) — color of the empty track behind the fill. `labelcolor` (color, default #555) — color of the label text. `height` (number px 2-48, default 12) — bar thickness. `showvalue` (boolean, default true) — false hides the "NN%" readout.
<!-- @progress percent: 85, label: Overall Project Progress, color: #2ecc71, height: 16 -->

param.name: label
param.label: Label
param.desc: Name of the measured metric, shown on the left.

param.name: track
param.label: Track Color
param.desc: Color of the empty track behind the fill.

param.name: showvalue
param.label: Show Value
param.desc: Show the NN% readout on the right.

snippet.label: Progress Bar
snippet.text: <!-- @progress percent: 85, label: Overall Project Progress, color: #2ecc71 -->
snippet.description: Displays a bar graph based on numbers.
